levels.body: Earth is ambiguous here. On the one hand, it refers to the „the ground considered as a place for burying the dead" (cf. "earth, n." 4). On the other hand, it can describe all the inhabitants of the world (cf. *OED* "earth, n." Def. 9b.).
worksCited: "earth, n." *OED Online*. OUP, Sept. 2016. Web. 3 Dec. 2016.
